meaning: Very Important Person 贵宾,大人物
examples: We'll give her some VIP treatment and roll out the red carpet.
Tickets were $40 to $60 if a guest wanted wine and a "VIP seat" near the stage.
The popular Loft Suite was the VIP Room for the Cauldron Nightclub, accessible via a hidden stairway.
You give active duty soldiers, wounded warriors, veterans all a VIP experience at races.
